Title: Setup: Environment & API Preparation
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/appendix/index.md) Set up Google Colab, install the required libraries, and configure the OpenAI API key securely as a secret.
Label: Setup

Title: Unit 01: Linear & Regularized Regression
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit01_linear_regression/index.md) Learn regression through a room-size and rent example, then implement Lasso regression with the diabetes dataset.
Label: Chapter-1: Classical-ML

Title: Unit 02: Logistic Regression & Classification Metrics
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit02_logistic_regression/index.md) Learn classification and metrics such as confusion matrices and ROC curves through examples like spam detection, then build a breast-cancer classifier.
Label: Chapter-1: Classical-ML

Title: Unit 03: K-NN & Support Vector Machines
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit03_knn_svm/index.md) Learn K-NN and SVM decision boundaries, then implement multiclass classification with the wine dataset.
Label: Chapter-1: Classical-ML

Title: Unit 04: Decision Trees & Random Forests
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit04_decision_trees_random_forests/index.md) Learn decision-tree questions and random-forest voting, then predict California housing prices.
Label: Chapter-1: Classical-ML

Title: Unit 05: Gradient Boosting & XGBoost
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit05_gradient_boosting_xgboost/index.md) Learn how boosting models correct one another and build a prediction pipeline with LightGBM or XGBoost.
Label: Chapter-1: Classical-ML

Title: Unit 06: Clustering Algorithms
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit06_clustering_algorithms/index.md) Learn K-Means and hierarchical clustering, then segment customers using purchasing data.
Label: Chapter-1: Classical-ML

Title: Unit 07: Dimensionality Reduction (PCA)
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit07_dimensionality_reduction/index.md) Learn PCA as information compression, then project handwritten-digit data into two dimensions for visualization.
Label: Chapter-1: Classical-ML

Title: Unit 08: Cross Validation & Hyperparameter Tuning
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit08_cross_validation_tuning/index.md) Learn cross-validation and automated tuning with Optuna, then tune an XGBoost model.
Label: Chapter-1: Classical-ML

Title: Unit 09: Machine Learning Capstone Project
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit09_classical_ml_capstone/index.md) Compare Lasso regression and XGBoost, and make a reasoned model-selection decision under data and interpretability constraints.
Label: Chapter-1: Classical-ML

Title: Unit 10: Neural Networks from Scratch
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit10_nn_from_scratch/index.md) Understand neural networks through an approval-process analogy and implement backpropagation with NumPy for XOR and OR gates.
Label: Chapter-2: Deep-Learning

Title: Unit 11: PyTorch Basics & Simple MLP
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit11_pytorch_basics/index.md) Learn PyTorch tensor operations and build a multilayer perceptron classifier.
Label: Chapter-2: Deep-Learning

Title: Unit 12: Optimizers & Loss Functions
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit12_optimizers_loss/index.md) Learn SGD, Adam, MSE, and cross-entropy, then implement a training loop for MNIST classification.
Label: Chapter-2: Deep-Learning

Title: Unit 13: Regularization in DL
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit13_regularization/index.md) Learn Dropout, BatchNorm, and Early Stopping to reduce overfitting and improve generalization.
Label: Chapter-2: Deep-Learning

Title: Unit 14: CNN Basics
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit14_cnn_basics/index.md) Learn convolution and pooling for image recognition, then classify color images with CIFAR-10.
Label: Chapter-2: Deep-Learning

Title: Unit 15: Transfer Learning with ResNet
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit15_transfer_learning/index.md) Learn transfer learning and classify custom images such as dogs and cats with a pretrained ResNet.
Label: Chapter-2: Deep-Learning

Title: Unit 16: Deep Learning Capstone Project
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit16_deep_learning_capstone/index.md) Compare a scratch CNN with ResNet transfer learning under a small-data constraint and justify the model choice.
Label: Chapter-2: Deep-Learning

Title: Unit 17: NLP Preprocessing & TF-IDF
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit17_nlp_preprocessing_tfidf/index.md) Learn text preprocessing and TF-IDF, then implement similarity search for news articles.
Label: Chapter-3: NLP-Transformers

Title: Unit 18: Word Embeddings (Word2Vec)
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit18_word_embeddings_word2vec/index.md) Learn Word2Vec and vector arithmetic such as king minus man plus woman equals queen.
Label: Chapter-3: NLP-Transformers

Title: Unit 19: RNNs & LSTMs
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit19_rnns_lstms/index.md) Learn networks with context and memory, then build sentiment analysis for movie reviews.
Label: Chapter-3: NLP-Transformers

Title: Unit 20: Attention & Transformers
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit20_attention_transformers/index.md) Understand attention and Transformers, then implement self-attention from scratch.
Label: Chapter-3: NLP-Transformers

Title: Unit 21: NLP Capstone Project
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit21_nlp_capstone/index.md) Compare RNN/LSTM with attention against a Transformer for translation in a tiny-corpus setting.
Label: Chapter-3: NLP-Transformers

Title: Unit 22: Evolution from LLM to AI Agent
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit22_llm_evolution/index.md) Learn the roadmap from LLMs to AI agents and implement an LLM API and a sentiment-analysis function.
Label: Chapter-4: LLM-Agents

Title: Unit 23: LLM API Usage & Prompting
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit23_llm_api/index.md) Learn LLM APIs and prompt engineering, then build an initial LLM application hub.
Label: Chapter-4: LLM-Agents

Title: Unit 24: Vector DBs & RAG From Scratch
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit24_vector_dbs_rag_from_scratch/index.md) Learn retrieval-augmented generation and implement RAG from scratch with NumPy and an API.
Label: Chapter-4: LLM-Agents

Title: Unit 25: LangChain Basics & RAG
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit25_langchain_basics_rag/index.md) Learn LangChain components and LCEL, then rebuild the scratch RAG pipeline with LangChain.
Label: Chapter-4: LLM-Agents

Title: Unit 26: LlamaIndex Basics & RAG
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit26_llamaindex_basics_rag/index.md) Learn a RAG-focused framework and apply its indexing and query-engine abstractions.
Label: Chapter-4: LLM-Agents

Title: Unit 27: Prompt Chaining
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit27_prompt_chaining/index.md) Decompose complex reasoning into prompt chains and build a pipeline from error-log analysis to code generation.
Label: Chapter-4: LLM-Agents

Title: Unit 28: Context-Aware Chatbot
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit28_context_aware_chatbot/index.md) Learn conversation-memory management and build an interactive Streamlit chatbot.
Label: Chapter-4: LLM-Agents

Title: Unit 29: AI Agent Fundamentals & Scratch ReAct Implementation
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit29_ai_agent_implementation/index.md) Implement OpenAI Tool Calling and an autonomous reasoning loop from scratch, then build an EC-return review agent.
Label: Chapter-4: LLM-Agents

Title: Unit 30: MCP Fundamentals & Server Implementation
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit30_mcp_fundamentals/index.md) Learn MCP architecture and build a JSON-RPC MCP server that provides tools and data to an agent.
Label: Chapter-4: LLM-Agents

Title: Unit 31: smolagents & AI Agent
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit31_smolagents_code_agent/index.md) Learn the lightweight smolagents code-execution framework and compare ReAct with CodeAgent implementations.
Label: Chapter-4: LLM-Agents

Title: Unit 32: LangGraph — Graph-Based Stateful Agents
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit32_langgraph_stateful_agents/index.md) Learn graph workflows with state, nodes, and edges, then build ticket routing with a human-approval gate.
Label: Chapter-4: LLM-Agents

Title: Unit 33: Agent SDK: General & Business Automation
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit33_agent_sdk_general_agents/index.md) Learn SDK-based agents with persistent state and data integrations, then connect a Stripe payment API.
Label: Chapter-4: LLM-Agents

Title: Unit 34: Agent SDK: Autonomous Coding & Software Engineering
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit34_agent_sdk_coding_agents/index.md) Learn sandbox- and file-operation-based coding agents, then implement deny-by-default policies and approval hooks.
Label: Chapter-4: LLM-Agents

Title: Unit 35: Tokenizer & BPE Fundamentals
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit35_tokenizer_bpe/index.md) Learn tokens, token IDs, a minimal BPE implementation, and token-count differences across languages.
Label: Chapter-4: LLM-Applied

Title: Unit 36: LoRA / QLoRA Fundamentals
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit36_lora_qlora/index.md) Learn low-rank adapters for frozen base models and the quantization trade-offs of QLoRA.
Label: Chapter-4: LLM-Applied

Title: Unit 37: LLM Harness & Agent Capstone Project
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit37_llm_harness_capstone/index.md) Build and validate a quality-evaluation harness using LLM-as-a-Judge.
Label: Chapter-5: Real-World-Capstones

Title: Unit 38: Multimodal Fraud Detection
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit38_multimodal_fraud_detection/index.md) Build a fraud-detection classifier that fuses tabular, text, and image data.
Label: Chapter-5: Real-World-Capstones

Title: Unit 39: Autonomous Knowledge Structuring
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit39_knowledge_structuring_agent/index.md) Build a pipeline that extracts structured JSON from unstructured data.
Label: Chapter-5: Real-World-Capstones

Title: Unit 40: Guardrails & LLM-as-a-Judge
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit40_guardrails_evaluation_harness/index.md) Build an audit pipeline combining input/output guardrails with LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation.
Label: Chapter-5: Real-World-Capstones

Title: Unit 41: Time Series & Dynamic Pricing
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit41_timeseries_price_optimizer/index.md) Detect time-series leakage and implement demand forecasting and price optimization.
Label: Chapter-5: Real-World-Capstones

Title: Unit 42: Multi-Agent Customer Support
Description: [Curriculum](docs/en/curriculum/unit42_multiagent_customer_support/index.md) Build a customer-support system with multiple cooperating agents.
Label: Chapter-5: Real-World-Capstones
